2026-03-03PMODepartment of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development ActAppointment of the Deputy Minister of Foreign AffairsAppointment of Arun Thangaraj of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development Act
subject: Appointment of the Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs
precis: Appointment of Arun Thangaraj of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
